button.data-desc: Define project details, technology stack, and warranty coverage
Assign a focal person and manage team members per project
Upload and manage documents linked to a project — visible on the focal board

div.p: Define project details, technology stack, and warranty coverage

div.span: Project deleted. A closure report has been saved under Project Reports.

textarea.name: project_goals
textarea.placeholder: Describe the project's purpose and expected outcomes...

div.p: Choose a project to manage its focal person and team members.

div.span: No team members yet. Add members above.

div.p: Choose a project to upload or manage its reference documents.

div.label: File * PDF, DOCX, TXT or XLSX

div.span: No documents uploaded for this project yet.
